
---
title: "Package architecture"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Package architecture}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

`similR` separates package code from the institutional bibliographic database. Package versions follow semantic versioning and data versions use `YYYY.MM`.

The DuckDB release contains four tables:

- `articles`;
- `embeddings`;
- `lexical_documents`;
- `database_metadata`.

The Phase 3 lexical index is reconstructed from `lexical_documents` only when needed. It is then cached as an RDS object under `tools::R_user_dir("similR", "cache")`. The cache key incorporates the database path, file size, modification time, and lexical-index schema version.

For each of the five dimensions, the cached object stores:

- a stable article ordering;
- vocabulary;
- sparse term-frequency matrix;
- normalized TF-IDF matrix;
- TF-IDF inverse-document frequencies;
- BM25 inverse-document frequencies;
- document lengths;
- exact terms.

The query is processed locally and compared with each dimension. Phase 4 will add an optional local semantic engine while preserving the same `recommend_articles()` interface.
